arts.ttl: How much are Man United demanding for Barcelona-linked Marcus Rashford?
arts.sum: An insight into the kind of transfer fee being sought by the brass at Manchester United to part with rumoured Barcelona transfer target Marcus Rashford has on Friday been provided.…

arts.ttl: Sky Sports: Aston Villa Want to Sign 'Phenomenal' £34m Man Utd target
arts.sum: Should Emi Martinez move on in the summer, then it appears Aston Villa have got a potential replacement already lined up.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa bidding to end 94-year streak, break club record in crucial Manchester United Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be bidding to end a 94-year streak and set a new club record when they face Manchester United in the Premier League on Sunday.
